nysr_voice_agent.name: NYSR AI Sales Agent

script.greeting: Hi, this is the AI assistant calling from NY Spotlight Report — you just requested your free AI automation audit. Got about 3 minutes to go over what we found?
script.insight_delivery: Based on what you shared, you are currently losing roughly [X hours per week] to manual [their pain point]. We see this a lot with [their business type].
script.offer: We can automate that in 7 days with our AI Follow-Up Bot. It contacts every lead in under 60 seconds, books appointments automatically, and sends you a report. $97 per month. Want me to text you the link to get started right now?
script.pilot_fallback: We also have a 30-day pilot option at $497 flat — no commitment. Want to try that first?
script.sms_trigger: Fires Stripe link via SMS during call if prospect says yes
script.follow_up: If no answer — schedule callback for 2 hours later, automated

integration.hubspot_update: Stage changes to HOT if interested

activation_steps: 1. Sign up at bland.ai (free trial available)
3. Get API key → add to GitHub Secrets as BLAND_AI_KEY
4. n8n webhook: form submit → POST to /v1/calls with lead data
5. Test with your own phone number first
6. Go live — every /audit/ form fill triggers a call in 60 seconds
